text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: But that's not what Tracen Academy's all about!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Hey—inside voice. But yes, I agree.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day after Ms. Kashimoto took up her role
as substitute director, and the gymnasium is full
of displeased students booing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
An hour ago, an assembly was held to welcome
her to the academy.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Now, a word from our new temporary director,
Ms. Kashimoto.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Greetings, students. My name is Riko Kashimoto,
and I was appointed to the academy just
yesterday.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I will be taking over Director Akikawa's duties for
the time being. I look forward to getting to know
you all.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Clap, clap, clap...

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Though I must say, my first impression when I
arrived was that you are all incredibly...
undisciplined.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Wh-what?

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I've witnessed an overreliance on solo training,
excessive tardiness, and gossip during breaks.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
There are even trainers who are unaware of their
own students' sleeping habits, indicating a
disconnect in their relationship.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
This is not so much the students' fault, but that of
their trainers' negligence. Above all, this
environment was fostered by Director Akikawa's
leniency.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
As such, I have devised a new training program
based on thorough management—I call it
Operation Oversight.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I will begin by overseeing your training schedules
and meals, and eventually move on to managing
every aspect of your private lives.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
These measures will serve not only to increase
your capabilities, but also to lower the risk of
injuries.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Umm... What's she saying, Rice?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Well... I guess we won't be able to snack on ice
cream at night anymore? I think?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Whaaat?! Why?!

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I will also be suspending the Unity Cup, which I
hear had been recently reinstated.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: No way! What's she talkin' about?!

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
You're all in a stage of life where your emotions
are volatile, and placing you into teams may
cause you to make illogical and emotional
decisions.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
As a preventative measure to avoid any
team-related tomfoolery, it seems prudent to
cancel such team-oriented programs.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
It's not like we'll lose our minds if we get put into
teams! Having teammates to support us will—

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
A thought experiment, then. Let's say a particular
team engages in an excessive amount of
supplementary training.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
They have no ill intentions and only want to work
hard as a team in order to claim victory.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
However, one of them pushes herself too hard
and injures herself to the point of being unable to
run.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Had she been on her own, she might have realized
her limits, but because she got carried away by
loyalty to her team, she overworked herself.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: If that isn't rash behavior, then what is?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Well... I mean...

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
For the sake of preventing such tragedies, I am
banning all team events and will manage your
well-beings as thoroughly as possible.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: I rest my point.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The room falls silent in the face of Ms.
Kashimoto's absolute decree.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Operation Oversight will be implemented as soon
as possible. Be prepared for future changes. This
is your only warning.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The assembly began with such optimism, but ends
in chaos.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, the countdown to the implementation of
Ms. Kashimoto's totalitarian management system
begins.
